tte_t Struct Reference
[Bare Metal Environment APIs]

The full data translation table entry. More...


Data Fields

SPR_DTLB_CURRENT_ATTR_t w0
 Word 0 of the TTE.
SPR_DTLB_CURRENT_VA_t w1
 Word 1 of the TTE.
SPR_DTLB_CURRENT_PA_t w2
 Word 2 of the TTE.

Detailed Description

The full data translation table entry.

Note that while we are using the DTLB versions of the registers here, this entry is usable for the ITLB as well, since the DTLB is a strict superset of the ITLB. The full translation table entry.

Examples:

bme/client_server/bme_server.c.

Field Documentation

SPR_DTLB_CURRENT_ATTR_t tte_t::w0

Word 0 of the TTE.

SPR_DTLB_CURRENT_VA_t tte_t::w1

Word 1 of the TTE.

SPR_DTLB_CURRENT_PA_t tte_t::w2

Word 2 of the TTE.
